_comment: Human-editable game knowledge base. Edit freely to improve recommendation quality. The engine reads this on every request — no restart needed.

win_conditions: Strength scaling: Limit Break + Inflame → heavy Whirlwind or Heavy Blade finisher
Exhaust loop: Corruption → feel free to exhaust everything, Dark Embrace/Dead Branch as draw
Barricade block stacking: Barricade + Entrench (event card — doubles Block) → unreduced block snowball

hellraiser_strike.description: Aggressive combo using upgraded Strikes for massive output

corruption_exhaust.description: Corruption makes all skills cost 0 + Exhaust, enabling explosive turns

vulnerable_vicious.description: Vicious draws a card on every Vulnerable applied — Taunt/Bash/Tremble fuel constant card draw and 50% damage amp for Whirlwind

exhaust_fiend_fire.description: Fill hand with 0-cost cards, exhaust everything with Fiend Fire for massive burst damage

strength_scaling.description: Stack Strength via Inflame + Limit Break, then unleash with Whirlwind or Heavy Blade

win_conditions: Speedster Draw Loop (S+): infinite cycle with Acrobatics/Footwork, output via Flick-Flack/Ricochet
Sly Discard (S): Flick-Flack, Ricochet, Untouchable — discard to burst
Poison stack: Noxious Fumes + Catalyst + Bouncing Flask for multi-enemy poison

speedster_draw_loop.description: Cycle infinitely through deck with draw cards, burst with Flick-Flack/Ricochet

poison.description: Stack Poison stacks via Noxious Fumes, multiply with Catalyst

win_conditions: Frost Focus Burst (A): stack Focus, channel Frost orbs for massive block
Lightning Storm (A): Electrodynamics + passive AoE on every orb evoke
Dark accumulation: channel Dark orbs, evoke for 99+ damage

frost_focus.description: Stack Focus with Biased Cognition/Defragment, channel Frost for scaling block

lightning_storm.description: Electrodynamics makes all orbs deal passive AoE — simple and consistent

win_conditions: Osty Summon (S+): stack Osty Max HP via Summon cards, then hit for massive damage with Unleash/Protector/Squeeze
Doom Burst (S): apply Doom stacks to enemies, execute at threshold — control/pressure playstyle
Soul Engine: cycle deck with Soul cards (draw), finish with Haunt+Soulstorm or Graveblast

osty_summon.description: Reanimate + Bodyguard to stack Osty HP, then Unleash/Protector/Squeeze for huge hits. Osty tanks hits — keep him alive at all costs.

doom_burst.description: Apply Doom stacks via Scourge/Doom Spike, execute enemies at threshold. Good vs high-HP bosses.

soul_engine.description: Soul cards as draw engine. Haunt depletes HP, finish with Soulstorm. Combos with any archetype.

important_notes: Osty is your primary defense — losing him early can lose the run
Soul cards are universal draw — include a few even in non-Soul builds
Doom and Osty can coexist but avoid diluting too much
Cheap Osty attacks (Poke, Fetch, Right Hand Hand) set up Squeeze/Rattle payoffs
Reanimate is the single best Max-HP spike — near-instant A/S tier pick

win_conditions: Stars Engine (S): generate Stars every turn → spend with Alignment/Seven Stars/Big Bang. COMMIT by end of Act 1.
Sovereign Blade Forge (B+): Retain + Forge stack the Blade for huge single-target. Lean deck (<20 cards) required.
Card-Copying: Quasar/Arsenal duplicate key cards, Confluence retains duplicates — requires Quasar early

stars_alignment.description: Generate 7+ Stars/turn, cash with Alignment (Stars→Energy), Seven Stars (AoE), or Big Bang (mass refund). Works with decks up to 25 cards.
stars_alignment.curve: Star generator Act 1 → Alignment by end of Act 1 → Big Bang or Seven Stars in Act 2

sovereign_blade_forge.description: Stack Forge on the Sovereign Blade (a Retained colorless). Lean deck to cycle into Blade reliably. Forge events like 'Decisions, Decisions' give exclusive Forge rewards.
sovereign_blade_forge.warning: Undertuned vs Stars in most scenarios. Only commit if first 3 rewards are Forge-specific.

critical_rules: NEVER mix Stars and Forge — a 50/50 split loses to both specialized builds consistently
Default to Stars if you cannot identify your path by end of Act 1
Stars scales with deck size; Forge stalls once Blade one-shots everything
Use Charge and Begone to remove starter Strikes/Defends and cycle faster
Regent is weak at defense — prioritize Particle Wall and rest sites

win_conditions: Wrath/Calm cycling: Eruption → Wrath (2x damage) → Reach Heaven → Calm (reduce cost), repeat for infinite value
Divinity burst: enter Divinity every 3 turns for 3x damage spike
Scry engine: Foresight/Weave → see top cards → pick perfect hands

wrath_calm_loop.description: Cycle between Wrath (2x damage) and Calm (energy refund) for infinite burst turns

mechanic_synergies._comment: Cards that enable specific mechanics. 'enablers' are cards in the deck that boost offered cards matching 'filter'.

zero_cost_attack.reason: Feral in deck — 0-cost attacks get returned to hand each turn

zero_cost_any.reason: Panache in deck — more 0-cost cards trigger its AoE faster

all_for_one_zero_cost.reason: All for One in deck — retrieves all 0-cost cards from discard, replaying them for free

zero_cost_enabler_for_all_for_one.reason: 0-cost cards in deck — All for One recovers them all from discard

compile_driver_zero_cost_synergy.reason: 0-cost cards in deck — Compile Driver draws more, cycling into them faster

battle_trance_fiend_fire.reason: Battle Trance in deck — draw 3 free cards before Fiend Fire exhausts hand for massive damage

fiend_fire_battle_trance.reason: Fiend Fire in deck — Battle Trance (0-cost, draw 3) fills hand before the exhaust finisher

battle_trance_byrd_swoop.reason: Battle Trance in deck — free draw refills hand with 0-cost Byrd Swoops for burst turns

byrd_swoop_battle_trance.reason: Byrd Swoop (0-cost) in deck — Battle Trance draws into more free attacks, perfect burst setup

inflame_whirlwind.reason: Inflame in deck — every point of Strength adds to all Whirlwind hits, multiplicative scaling

whirlwind_inflame.reason: Whirlwind in deck — Inflame's Strength multiplies across every hit, must-pick

inflame_limit_break.reason: Inflame in deck — Limit Break doubles accumulated Strength, explosive combo

limit_break_inflame.reason: Limit Break in deck — Inflame front-loads Strength for Limit Break to double

inflame_heavy_blade.reason: Inflame in deck — Heavy Blade multiplies Strength 5×, Inflame greatly increases its damage

heavy_blade_inflame.reason: Heavy Blade in deck — Inflame's Strength is multiplied 5× by Heavy Blade, must-pick

dark_embrace_exhaust_synergy.reason: Exhaust cards in deck — Dark Embrace draws a card each time you exhaust, massive card draw engine

feel_no_pain_exhaust_synergy.reason: Exhaust cards in deck — Feel No Pain gains Block each time you exhaust

hellraiser_strike_requirement.reason: Needs 3+ Strike-named cards to trigger consistently

vicious_taunt_synergy.reason: Vicious in deck — Taunt applies Vulnerable, drawing a free card each time

taunt_vicious_synergy.reason: Taunt in deck — Vicious draws a card every time Taunt applies Vulnerable

relic_synergies._comment: Keys are unique IDs (use relic_id field when one relic needs multiple rules). Add new relics as you obtain them.

RELIC.CRACKED_CORE.focus.reason: Cracked Core channels Lightning — Focus cards increase its damage

RELIC.CRACKED_CORE.orb.reason: Cracked Core channels Lightning — Orb synergy cards amplify it

RELIC.NEOWS_TORMENT.reason: Neow's Torment — boosts all 0-cost cards, making them trigger its effect

RELIC.BAG_OF_MARBLES.reason: Bag of Marbles applies Vulnerable — attacks deal 50% more damage

RELIC.ORNAMENTAL_FAN.reason: Ornamental Fan — 0-cost attacks trigger Block every 3rd hit faster

RELIC.RED_MASK.go_for_eyes.reason: ↓ Red Mask already applies Weak at combat start — Go for the Eyes' effect is redundant

1.summary: Build consistency. Prefer 1-cost cards. Identify your archetype by floor 10. Avoid 3-cost without payoff.
notes: 1-cost cards are almost always correct — cheap = consistent
3-cost before energy scaling is often a mistake
Draw and cycle cards are most valuable here — find your engine pieces faster
Block matters more early — you don't know the deck yet, you'll take hits
Identify Stars vs Forge (Regent) or Osty vs Doom (Necrobinder) by Act 1 end
Use Charge/Begone (Regent) or deck thinning to remove weak starters

2.summary: Lock in your archetype. Take key synergy pieces. Skip cards that don't fit the plan.
notes: By Act 2 you should know your win condition — don't take cards that contradict it
Key archetype payoffs (Catalyst, Limit Break, Alignment, Squeeze) are top priority
Consider whether the card makes your deck more consistent OR more explosive
3-cost can be correct if it's a key win-condition piece
Avoid random Commons that don't advance the plan — they dilute cycling

3.summary: Only take genuine upgrades. Rare > Uncommon > skip a Common. Think: does this beat the final boss?
notes: Your deck is set by Act 3 — adding filler kills consistency
A Common that doesn't directly synergise is almost always a skip
Rare cards have high ceilings — almost always worth evaluating seriously
Ask: if I draw this in the boss fight, does it actively help or sit dead?
Upgrades matter most here — prioritise cards you can upgrade at rest sites

_baalorlord_comment: Tier lists scraped from sts2.untapped.gg/en/tier-list (Baalorlord, last updated Jun 2026). Used as an independent signal alongside our own context — higher weight = higher confidence from pro play.

ENCOUNTER.CEREMONIAL_BEAST_BOSS.name: Ceremonial Beast
ENCOUNTER.CEREMONIAL_BEAST_BOSS.summary: Act 1 boss. High damage output in later turns; needs enough block generation to survive. Strength scaling or burn damage is effective.
ENCOUNTER.CEREMONIAL_BEAST_BOSS.tip: Build block generation before this fight. Vulnerability + big attacks ends it quickly.

ENCOUNTER.KAISER_CRAB_BOSS.name: Kaiser Crab
ENCOUNTER.KAISER_CRAB_BOSS.summary: Two-target fight (Crusher 199 HP, Rocket 189 HP). You are Surrounded — attacks from behind deal 50% more damage. End your turn facing the biggest threat. Kill Rocket first (turn 4 nuke deals ~33–49 dmg). When a claw dies, the other gains 6 Strength + 99 Block for 1 turn (do not waste attacks that turn). AoE hits both claws and is extremely efficient here.
ENCOUNTER.KAISER_CRAB_BOSS.tip: AoE cards hit both claws — extremely efficient. Poison bypasses Crusher block stacking. Plan turns so your final targeted attack faces the highest-damage claw. Kill Rocket by turn 4 or tank a massive nuke.

ENCOUNTER.QUEEN_BOSS.name: The Queen
ENCOUNTER.QUEEN_BOSS.summary: Act 3 final boss. Prepare a well-rounded deck with strong damage and block.
ENCOUNTER.QUEEN_BOSS.tip: Focus on deck consistency and high damage output for the final push.

Weak.reason: Weak is a duration debuff — Red Mask (1t) + 2× upgraded Go for the Eyes (2t each) = 5 turns is the optimised cap

Vulnerable.reason: Vulnerable is a duration debuff — ~4 turns is the useful cap

Frail.reason: Frail is a duration debuff — ~3 turns is the useful cap

general_advice.deck_size: Smaller decks are more consistent — remove starters when possible. 10-15 is ideal, 20+ starts to feel clunky unless you have good draw.
general_advice.draw_always_good: A card that draws more cards is almost always worth considering — finding your engine pieces faster is foundational.
general_advice.avoid_win_more: Cards that are great when you're already winning but useless when behind are low priority. Prefer cards that are good when things go wrong.
general_advice.upgrade_priority: Cards you plan to play every turn deserve upgrades first. Upgrade costs 0-cost cards last.
